ALTER SETTINGS PROFILE my_profile SETTINGS max_memory_usage=10000000000, max_rows_in_set=100000;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
ALTER SETTINGS PROFILE my_profile SETTINGS max_threads=8;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE 'test%');
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO another_table SELECT number, number + 0.5 FROM numbers(10);
ALTER SETTINGS PROFILE my_profile SETTINGS min_bytes_to_use_direct_io=1048576;
SELECT a.id, b.value FROM test_table AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.value > 1.0;
ALTER SETTINGS PROFILE another_profile SETTINGS max_rows_to_read=5000;
CREATE TABLE example_table (id UInt32, timestamp DateTime, amount Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (id, timestamp);
INSERT INTO example_table SELECT number, now(), number * 1.1 FROM numbers(100);
ALTER SETTINGS PROFILE my_profile SETTINGS enable_optimize_predicate_pushdown=1;
SELECT * FROM example_table WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
ALTER SETTINGS PROFILE new_profile SETTINGS allow_experimental_parallel_read=1;
SELECT a.id, COUNT(b.value) FROM test_table AS a LEFT JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.id GROUP BY a.id;
